data.content: Removed Scenes/Breakdown view wiring from Beads UI: dropped breakdown view parsing/rendering in beads page/header, removed create/detail breakdown entry points, and removed BeatForm breakdown action. Added regression test src/lib/__tests__/beads-scenes-wiring.test.ts. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, NODE_ENV=production bun run build.
